parts.text: /review Verify the latest fix for invalid WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROVIDER handling (no silent fallback to simulated). Check workspace-deploy-provider.ts, workspace-deployments.ts, and system.ts. Blocking issues only.

state.output:
<path>/Users/nickdejesus/Code/nimbus/packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deploy-provider.ts</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1: import type { Env, WorkspaceDeploymentStatus } from '../types.js';
2: 
3: export type WorkspaceDeployProviderName = 'simulated' | 'cloudflare_workers_assets';
4: 
5: export interface WorkspaceDeployProviderPrecheck {
6:   code: string;
7:   ok: boolean;
8:   details?: string;
9: }
10: 
11: export interface WorkspaceDeployCreateInput {
12:   workspaceId: string;
13:   deploymentId: string;
14:   outputDir: string;
15:   outputBundle: {
16:     bytes: Uint8Array;
17:     sha256: string;
18:   };
19: }
20: 
21: export interface WorkspaceDeployCreateResult {
22:   providerDeploymentId: string;
23:   status: WorkspaceDeploymentStatus;
24:   deployedUrl: string | null;
25: }
26: 
27: export interface WorkspaceDeployStatusResult {
28:   status: WorkspaceDeploymentStatus;
29:   deployedUrl: string | null;
30:   errorCode?: string;
31:   errorMessage?: string;
32: }
33: 
34: export interface WorkspaceDeployProvider {
35:   readonly name: WorkspaceDeployProviderName;
36:   precheck(): Promise<WorkspaceDeployProviderPrecheck[]>;
37:   createDeployment(input: WorkspaceDeployCreateInput): Promise<WorkspaceDeployCreateResult>;
38:   getDeploymentStatus(providerDeploymentId: string): Promise<WorkspaceDeployStatusResult>;
39:   cancelDeployment(providerDeploymentId: string): Promise<{ accepted: boolean }>;
40: }
41: 
42: class ProviderError extends Error {
43:   constructor(
44:     public readonly code:
45:       | 'provider_auth_failed'
46:       | 'provider_rate_limited'
47:       | 'provider_project_not_found'
48:       | 'provider_deploy_failed'
49:       | 'provider_invalid_output_dir'
50:       | 'provider_scope_missing',
51:     message: string
52:   ) {
53:     super(message);
54:     this.name = 'ProviderError';
55:   }
56: }
57: 
58: type ProviderFetch = typeof fetch;
59: 
60: let providerFetch: ProviderFetch = fetch;
61: 
62: export function setWorkspaceDeployProviderFetchForTests(fetchImpl: ProviderFetch | null): void {
63:   providerFetch = fetchImpl ?? fetch;
64: }
65: 
66: function parseBoolean(value: string | undefined, fallback: boolean): boolean {
67:   if (value === undefined) {
68:     return fallback;
69:   }
70:   const normalized = value.trim().toLowerCase();
71:   if (normalized === 'true' || normalized === '1' || normalized === 'yes' || normalized === 'on') {
72:     return true;
73:   }
74:   if (normalized === 'false' || normalized === '0' || normalized === 'no' || normalized === 'off') {
75:     return false;
76:   }
77:   return fallback;
78: }
79: 
80: function requireEnv(
81:   value: string | undefined,
82:   key: string,
83:   code: 'provider_auth_failed' | 'provider_scope_missing' | 'provider_deploy_failed' = 'provider_auth_failed'
84: ): string {
85:   if (typeof value !== 'string' || value.trim() === '') {
86:     throw new ProviderError(code, `Missing required provider env: ${key}`);
87:   }
88:   return value.trim();
89: }
90: 
91: function cloudflareErrorsMessage(input: unknown): string | null {
92:   if (!Array.isArray(input)) {
93:     return null;
94:   }
95:   const messages = input
96:     .map((item) => {
97:       if (!item || typeof item !== 'object') {
98:         return null;
99:       }
100:       const record = item as Record<string, unknown>;
101:       if (typeof record.message === 'string' && record.message.trim()) {
102:         return record.message.trim();
103:       }
104:       return null;
105:     })
106:     .filter((value): value is string => Boolean(value));
107:   if (messages.length === 0) {
108:     return null;
109:   }
110:   return messages.join('; ');
111: }
112: 
113: function toBase64(bytes: Uint8Array): string {
114:   const alphabet = 'REDACTED/';
115:   let output = '';
116:   for (let index = 0; index < bytes.length; index += 3) {
117:     const a = bytes[index] ?? 0;
118:     const b = bytes[index + 1] ?? 0;
119:     const c = bytes[index + 2] ?? 0;
120:     const value = (a << 16) | (b << 8) | c;
121:     output += alphabet[(value >> 18) & 63] ?? '';
122:     output += alphabet[(value >> 12) & 63] ?? '';
123:     output += index + 1 < bytes.length ? alphabet[(value >> 6) & 63] ?? '' : '=';
124:     output += index + 2 < bytes.length ? alphabet[value & 63] ?? '' : '=';
125:   }
126:   return output;
127: }
128: 
129: function isValidRelativeOutputDir(value: string): boolean {
130:   if (!value || value === '.') {
131:     return false;
132:   }
133:   if (value.startsWith('/') || value.includes('..') || value.includes('\\')) {
134:     return false;
135:   }
136:   return value.split('/').every((segment) => Boolean(segment) && segment !== '.');
137: }
138: 
139: function mapProviderState(input: string): WorkspaceDeploymentStatus {
140:   const normalized = input.trim().toLowerCase();
141:   if (normalized === 'queued' || normalized === 'pending') {
142:     return 'queued';
143:   }
144:   if (normalized === 'running' || normalized === 'in_progress' || normalized === 'processing') {
145:     return 'running';
146:   }
147:   if (normalized === 'succeeded' || normalized === 'success' || normalized === 'completed' || normalized === 'active') {
148:     return 'succeeded';
149:   }
150:   if (normalized === 'cancelled' || normalized === 'canceled') {
151:     return 'cancelled';
152:   }
153:   return 'failed';
154: }
155: 
156: class SimulatedWorkspaceDeployProvider implements WorkspaceDeployProvider {
157:   readonly name = 'simulated' as const;
158: 
159:   constructor(private readonly env: Env) {}
160: 
161:   async precheck(): Promise<WorkspaceDeployProviderPrecheck[]> {
162:     return [{ code: 'provider_simulated', ok: true, details: 'simulated provider selected' }];
163:   }
164: 
165:   async createDeployment(input: WorkspaceDeployCreateInput): Promise<WorkspaceDeployCreateResult> {
166:     const deployBase = (this.env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_BASE_URL ?? 'https://deployments.nimbus.local').replace(/\/+$/, '');
167:     return {
168:       providerDeploymentId: input.deploymentId,
169:       status: 'succeeded',
170:       deployedUrl: `${deployBase}/${input.workspaceId}/${input.deploymentId}`,
171:     };
172:   }
173: 
174:   async getDeploymentStatus(_providerDeploymentId: string): Promise<WorkspaceDeployStatusResult> {
175:     return { status: 'succeeded', deployedUrl: null };
176:   }
177: 
178:   async cancelDeployment(_providerDeploymentId: string): Promise<{ accepted: boolean }> {
179:     return { accepted: true };
180:   }
181: }
182: 
183: class CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider implements WorkspaceDeployProvider {
184:   readonly name = 'cloudflare_workers_assets' as const;
185:   private readonly accountId: string;
186:   private readonly apiToken: string;
187:   private readonly previewDomain: string;
188:   private readonly projectName: string;
189: 
190:   constructor(private readonly env: Env) {
191:     this.accountId = requireEnv(env.CF_ACCOUNT_ID, 'CF_ACCOUNT_ID');
192:     this.apiToken = requireEnv(env.CF_API_TOKEN, 'CF_API_TOKEN');
193:     this.previewDomain = requireEnv(
194:       env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PREVIEW_DOMAIN,
195:       'WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PREVIEW_DOMAIN',
196:       'provider_deploy_failed'
197:     );
198:     this.projectName = requireEnv(
199:       env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROJECT_NAME,
200:       'WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROJECT_NAME',
201:       'provider_deploy_failed'
202:     );
203: 
204:     if (!parseBoolean(env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_REAL_PROVIDER_ENABLED, false)) {
205:       throw new ProviderError(
206:         'provider_deploy_failed',
207:         'Real deploy provider is disabled; set WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_REAL_PROVIDER_ENABLED=true to enable'
208:       );
209:     }
210:   }
211: 
212:   private request(path: string, init?: RequestInit): Promise<Response> {
213:     return providerFetch(`https://api.cloudflare.com/client/v4${path}`, {
214:       ...init,
215:       headers: {
216:         Authorization: `Bearer ${this.apiToken}`,
217:         'Content-Type': 'application/json',
218:         ...(init?.headers ?? {}),
219:       },
220:     });
221:   }
222: 
223:   private async parseCloudflareResult(response: Response): Promise<Record<string, unknown>> {
224:     const text = await response.text();
225:     let parsed: Record<string, unknown> = {};
226:     try {
227:       parsed = JSON.parse(text) as Record<string, unknown>;
228:     } catch {
229:       parsed = {};
230:     }
231: 
232:     if (response.status === 401) {
233:       throw new ProviderError('provider_auth_failed', 'Cloudflare API token is invalid');
234:     }
235:     if (response.status === 403) {
236:       throw new ProviderError('provider_scope_missing', 'Cloudflare API token is missing required scopes');
237:     }
238:     if (response.status === 404) {
239:       throw new ProviderError('provider_project_not_found', `Cloudflare project ${this.projectName} was not found`);
240:     }
241:     if (response.status === 429) {
242:       throw new ProviderError('provider_rate_limited', 'Cloudflare API rate limit exceeded');
243:     }
244:     if (!response.ok) {
245:       const errorMessage =
246:         cloudflareErrorsMessage(parsed.errors) ??
247:         (typeof parsed.errors === 'object' && parsed.errors !== null
248:           ? JSON.stringify(parsed.errors)
249:           : text || `Cloudflare API request failed with status ${response.status}`);
250:       throw new ProviderError('provider_deploy_failed', errorMessage);
251:     }
252: 
253:     if (parsed.success === false) {
254:       const errorMessage =
255:         cloudflareErrorsMessage(parsed.errors) ??
256:         `Cloudflare API reported success=false${response.status ? ` (status ${response.status})` : ''}`;
257:       throw new ProviderError('provider_deploy_failed', errorMessage);
258:     }
259: 
260:     return parsed;
261:   }
262: 
263:   private previewUrlForDeployment(deploymentId: string): string {
264:     return `https://dep-${deploymentId}.${this.previewDomain}`;
265:   }
266: 
267:   async precheck(): Promise<WorkspaceDeployProviderPrecheck[]> {
268:     const checks: WorkspaceDeployProviderPrecheck[] = [];
269:     checks.push({ code: 'provider_real_enabled', ok: true });
270:     checks.push({ code: 'provider_credentials_present', ok: true });
271: 
272:     const response = await this.request(`/accounts/${this.accountId}/workers/scripts/${this.projectName}`);
273:     await this.parseCloudflareResult(response);
274:     checks.push({ code: 'provider_project_access', ok: true });
275:     return checks;
276:   }
277: 
278:   async createDeployment(input: WorkspaceDeployCreateInput): Promise<WorkspaceDeployCreateResult> {
279:     if (!isValidRelativeOutputDir(input.outputDir)) {
280:       throw new ProviderError(
281:         'provider_invalid_output_dir',
282:         'deploy.outputDir must be a safe non-root relative directory path'
283:       );
284:     }
285: 
286:     const uploadResponse = await this.request(`/accounts/${this.accountId}/workers/scripts/${this.projectName}/assets/upload`, {
287:       method: 'POST',
288:       body: JSON.stringify({
289:         deployment_id: input.deploymentId,
290:         output_dir: input.outputDir,
291:         artifact_sha256: input.outputBundle.sha256,
292:         artifact_bytes: input.outputBundle.bytes.byteLength,
293:         artifact_base64: toBase64(input.outputBundle.bytes),
294:       }),
295:     });
296:     const uploadParsed = await this.parseCloudflareResult(uploadResponse);
297:     const uploadResult =
298:       typeof uploadParsed.result === 'object' && uploadParsed.result !== null
299:         ? (uploadParsed.result as Record<string, unknown>)
300:         : {};
301:     const assetUploadId =
302:       typeof uploadResult.upload_id === 'string' && uploadResult.upload_id.trim()
303:         ? uploadResult.upload_id.trim()
304:         : `upload_${input.deploymentId}`;
305: 
306:     const response = await this.request(`/accounts/${this.accountId}/workers/scripts/${this.projectName}/deployments`, {
307:       method: 'POST',
308:       body: JSON.stringify({
309:         deployment_id: input.deploymentId,
310:         alias: `dep-${input.deploymentId}`,
311:         output_dir: input.outputDir,
312:         asset_upload_id: assetUploadId,
313:         preview_url: this.previewUrlForDeployment(input.deploymentId),
314:       }),
315:     });
316:     const parsed = await this.parseCloudflareResult(response);
317:     const result =
318:       typeof parsed.result === 'object' && parsed.result !== null ? (parsed.result as Record<string, unknown>) : {};
319:     const providerDeploymentId =
320:       typeof result.id === 'string' && result.id.trim() ? result.id.trim() : `cfdep_${input.deploymentId}`;
321: 
322:     return {
323:       providerDeploymentId,
324:       status: 'running',
325:       deployedUrl: this.previewUrlForDeployment(input.deploymentId),
326:     };
327:   }
328: 
329:   async getDeploymentStatus(providerDeploymentId: string): Promise<WorkspaceDeployStatusResult> {
330:     const response = await this.request(
331:       `/accounts/${this.accountId}/workers/scripts/${this.projectName}/deployments/${providerDeploymentId}`
332:     );
333:     const parsed = await this.parseCloudflareResult(response);
334:     const result =
335:       typeof parsed.result === 'object' && parsed.result !== null ? (parsed.result as Record<string, unknown>) : {};
336:     const state = typeof result.status === 'string' ? mapProviderState(result.status) : 'running';
337:     return {
338:       status: state,
339:       deployedUrl: typeof result.preview_url === 'string' && result.preview_url.trim() ? result.preview_url : null,
340:       errorCode: typeof result.error_code === 'string' ? result.error_code : undefined,
341:       errorMessage: typeof result.error_message === 'string' ? result.error_message : undefined,
342:     };
343:   }
344: 
345:   async cancelDeployment(providerDeploymentId: string): Promise<{ accepted: boolean }> {
346:     const response = await this.request(
347:       `/accounts/${this.accountId}/workers/scripts/${this.projectName}/deployments/${providerDeploymentId}/cancel`,
348:       { method: 'POST', body: '{}' }
349:     );
350: 
351:     if (response.status === 404 || response.status === 409) {
352:       return { accepted: false };
353:     }
354: 
355:     await this.parseCloudflareResult(response);
356:     return { accepted: true };
357:   }
358: }
359: 
360: export function getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(input: unknown, env: Env): WorkspaceDeployProviderName {
361:   if (typeof input === 'string' && input.trim()) {
362:     if (input === 'simulated' || input === 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
363:       return input;
364:     }
365:   }
366: 
367:   if (env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROVIDER === 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
368:     return 'cloudflare_workers_assets';
369:   }
370: 
371:   return 'simulated';
372: }
373: 
374: export function getWorkspaceDeployProviderConfigError(env: Env): string | null {
375:   const configured = typeof env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROVIDER === 'string' ? env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROVIDER.trim() : '';
376:   if (!configured || configured === 'simulated' || configured === 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
377:     return null;
378:   }
379:   return `Invalid WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROVIDER value: ${configured}. Use simulated or cloudflare_workers_assets.`;
380: }
381: 
382: export function createWorkspaceDeployProvider(providerName: WorkspaceDeployProviderName, env: Env): WorkspaceDeployProvider {
383:   if (providerName === 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
384:     return new CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider(env);
385:   }
386:   return new SimulatedWorkspaceDeployProvider(env);
387: }
388: 
389: export function normalizeProviderError(error: unknown): { code: string; message: string } {
390:   if (error instanceof ProviderError) {
391:     return { code: error.code, message: error.message };
392:   }
393: 
394:   if (error instanceof Error) {
395:     return { code: 'provider_deploy_failed', message: error.message };
396:   }
397: 
398:   return { code: 'provider_deploy_failed', message: String(error) };
399: }

(End of file - total 399 lines)
</content>

<type>file</type>
<content>1: import type { Env } from '../types.js';
2: import { loadRuntimeFlags } from '../lib/flags.js';
3: import {
4:   appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent,
5:   createWorkspaceDeployment,
6:   generateWorkspaceDeploymentId,
7:   getWorkspace,
8:   getWorkspaceDeployment,
9:   hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent,
10:   listWorkspaceDeploymentEvents,
11:   updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary,
12:   WorkspaceDeploymentIdempotencyConflictError,
13: } from '../lib/db.js';
14: import { createWorkspaceDeploymentQueueMessage } from '../lib/workspace-deployment-queue.js';
15: import {
16:   cancelWorkspaceDeployment,
17:   runWorkspaceDeploymentInlineWithRetries,
18:   runWorkspaceDeploymentPreflight,
19: } from '../lib/workspace-deployment-runner.js';
20: import {
21:   createWorkspaceDeployProvider,
22:   getWorkspaceDeployProviderConfigError,
23:   getWorkspaceDeployProviderName,
24:   normalizeProviderError,
25: } from '../lib/workspace-deploy-provider.js';
26: 
27: const corsHeaders = {
28:   'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*',
29:   'Access-Control-Allow-Methods': 'GET, POST, DELETE, OPTIONS',
30:   'Access-Control-Allow-Headers': 'Content-Type, Idempotency-Key',
31: };
32: 
33: function jsonResponse(body: unknown, status = 200): Response {
34:   return new Response(JSON.stringify(body), {
35:     status,
36:     headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', ...corsHeaders },
37:   });
38: }
39: 
40: function parseInteger(input: unknown, fallback: number, min: number, max: number): number {
41:   if (typeof input !== 'number' || !Number.isFinite(input)) {
42:     return fallback;
43:   }
44:   const value = Math.floor(input);
45:   if (value < min) {
46:     return min;
47:   }
48:   if (value > max) {
49:     return max;
50:   }
51:   return value;
52: }
53: 
54: function parseBoolean(input: unknown, fallback: boolean): boolean {
55:   if (typeof input !== 'boolean') {
56:     return fallback;
57:   }
58:   return input;
59: }
60: 
61: function isSafeRelativeOutputDir(input: string): boolean {
62:   if (!input || input === '.') {
63:     return false;
64:   }
65:   if (input.startsWith('/') || input.includes('..') || input.includes('\\')) {
66:     return false;
67:   }
68:   return input.split('/').every((segment) => Boolean(segment) && segment !== '.');
69: }
70: 
71: function parseDeployOutputDir(input: unknown): string | null {
72:   if (typeof input !== 'string') {
73:     return null;
74:   }
75:   const trimmed = input.trim().replace(/\\/g, '/').replace(/^\.\//, '').replace(/\/+$/, '');
76:   return trimmed || null;
77: }
78: 
79: function buildDeploymentIdempotencyPayload(requestPayload: {
80:   provider: string;
81:   retry: { maxRetries: number };
82:   validation: { runBuildIfPresent: boolean; runTestsIfPresent: boolean };
83:   autoFix: { rehydrateBaseline: boolean; bootstrapToolchain: boolean };
84:   toolchain: { manager: string | null; version: string | null };
85:   cache: { dependencyCache: boolean };
86:   deploy: { outputDir: string | null };
87:   rollbackOnFailure: boolean;
88:   provenance: { trigger: string; taskId: string | null; operationId: string | null; note: string | null };
89: }): Record<string, unknown> {
90:   const payload: Record<string, unknown> = {
91:     provider: requestPayload.provider,
92:     retry: requestPayload.retry,
93:     validation: requestPayload.validation,
94:     rollbackOnFailure: requestPayload.rollbackOnFailure,
95:     provenance: requestPayload.provenance,
96:   };
97: 
98:   if (requestPayload.autoFix.rehydrateBaseline || requestPayload.autoFix.bootstrapToolchain) {
99:     payload.autoFix = requestPayload.autoFix;
100:   }
101: 
102:   if (requestPayload.toolchain.manager || requestPayload.toolchain.version) {
103:     payload.toolchain = requestPayload.toolchain;
104:   }
105: 
106:   if (!requestPayload.cache.dependencyCache) {
107:     payload.cache = requestPayload.cache;
108:   }
109: 
110:   if (requestPayload.deploy.outputDir) {
111:     payload.deploy = requestPayload.deploy;
112:   }
113: 
114:   return payload;
115: }
116: 
117: function nextActionForDeploymentError(code: string | undefined): string | null {
118:   switch (code) {
119:     case 'toolchain_detect_failed':
120:       return 'Verify package.json and lockfile metadata, then retry deploy.';
121:     case 'corepack_missing':
122:       return 'Use a sandbox image with corepack available, or switch to npm toolchain.';
123:     case 'package_manager_bootstrap_failed':
124:       return 'Confirm the requested package manager version is valid and retry deploy.';
125:     case 'validation_tool_missing':
126:       return 'Disable build/test validation for this deploy or install required tooling in the sandbox image.';
127:     case 'validation_command_failed':
128:       return 'Review test/build output, fix project errors, and retry deploy.';
129:     case 'invalid_project_root':
130:       return 'Set workspace source project root to a safe relative path and retry deploy.';
131:     case 'baseline_missing':
132:     case 'baseline_rehydrate_failed':
133:       return 'Reset the workspace and retry deploy to rebuild git baseline.';
134:     case 'potential_secrets_detected':
135:       return 'Remove sensitive files from workspace before deploying (template files like .env.example are allowed).';
136:     case 'provider_auth_failed':
137:       return 'Verify CF_ACCOUNT_ID and CF_API_TOKEN, then rerun preflight.';
138:     case 'provider_scope_missing':
139:       return 'Grant Workers Scripts/Routes edit scope to CF_API_TOKEN and rerun preflight.';
140:     case 'provider_project_not_found':
141:       return 'Set WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROJECT_NAME to an existing Workers project and retry.';
142:     case 'provider_rate_limited':
143:       return 'Retry deploy after Cloudflare rate limits reset.';
144:     case 'provider_invalid_output_dir':
145:       return 'Set deploy.outputDir to a valid static build directory (for example dist or out) and retry.';
146:     case 'provider_deploy_failed':
147:       return 'Check provider deployment logs and retry after fixing configuration or build output.';
148:     default:
149:       return null;
150:   }
151: }
152: 
153: async function sha256Hex(input: string): Promise<string> {
154:   const digest = await crypto.subtle.digest('SHA-256', new TextEncoder().encode(input));
155:   return Array.from(new Uint8Array(digest))
156:     .map((byte) => byte.toString(16).padStart(2, '0'))
157:     .join('');
158: }
159: 
160: async function ensureWorkspaceReady(env: Env, workspaceId: string): Promise<Response | null> {
161:   const workspace = await getWorkspace(env.DB, workspaceId);
162:   if (!workspace || workspace.status === 'deleted') {
163:     return jsonResponse({ error: 'Workspace not found' }, 404);
164:   }
165:   if (workspace.status !== 'ready') {
166:     return jsonResponse(
167:       {
168:         error: 'Workspace is not ready',
169:         workspace: {
170:           id: workspace.id,
171:           status: workspace.status,
172:           errorCode: workspace.errorCode,
173:           errorMessage: workspace.errorMessage,
174:         },
175:       },
176:       409
177:     );
178:   }
179:   return null;
180: }
181: 
182: async function ensureWorkspaceExists(env: Env, workspaceId: string): Promise<Response | null> {
183:   const workspace = await getWorkspace(env.DB, workspaceId);
184:   if (!workspace || workspace.status === 'deleted') {
185:     return jsonResponse({ error: 'Workspace not found' }, 404);
186:   }
187:   return null;
188: }
189: 
190: async function ensureWorkspaceDeployEnabled(env: Env): Promise<Response | null> {
191:   const flags = await loadRuntimeFlags(env);
192:   if (!flags.workspaceDeployEnabled) {
193:     return jsonResponse(
194:       {
195:         error: 'Workspace deploy is disabled',
196:         code: 'workspace_deploy_disabled',
197:       },
198:       403
199:     );
200:   }
201:   return null;
202: }
203: 
204: export async function handleCreateWorkspaceDeployment(
205:   workspaceId: string,
206:   request: Request,
207:   env: Env,
208:   ctx?: ExecutionContext
209: ): Promise<Response> {
210:   try {
211:     const enabled = await ensureWorkspaceDeployEnabled(env);
212:     if (enabled) {
213:       return enabled;
214:     }
215: 
216:     const workspaceCheck = await ensureWorkspaceReady(env, workspaceId);
217:     if (workspaceCheck) {
218:       return workspaceCheck;
219:     }
220: 
221:     if (!env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOYS_QUEUE && !ctx) {
222:       return jsonResponse(
223:         {
224:           error: 'Workspace deployment runner is unavailable',
225:           code: 'workspace_deploy_runner_unavailable',
226:         },
227:         503
228:       );
229:     }
230: 
231:     const idempotencyKey = (request.headers.get('Idempotency-Key') ?? '').trim();
232:     if (!idempotencyKey) {
233:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Missing required Idempotency-Key header' }, 400);
234:     }
235: 
236:     const payloadRaw = await request.text();
237:     let payload: Record<string, unknown> = {};
238:     if (payloadRaw.trim()) {
239:       const parsed = JSON.parse(payloadRaw) as unknown;
240:       if (!parsed || typeof parsed !== 'object' || Array.isArray(parsed)) {
241:         return jsonResponse({ error: 'Request body must be a JSON object' }, 400);
242:       }
243:       payload = parsed as Record<string, unknown>;
244:     }
245: 
246:     const providerInput = typeof payload.provider === 'string' ? payload.provider.trim() : '';
247:     const providerConfigError = getWorkspaceDeployProviderConfigError(env);
248:     if (!providerInput && providerConfigError) {
249:       return jsonResponse(
250:         {
251:           error: providerConfigError,
252:           code: 'provider_config_invalid',
253:         },
254:         400
255:       );
256:     }
257:     if (providerInput && providerInput !== 'simulated' && providerInput !== 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
258:       return jsonResponse(
259:         {
260:           error: 'Unsupported deployment provider',
261:           code: 'unsupported_deploy_provider',
262:           allowedProviders: ['simulated', 'cloudflare_workers_assets'],
263:         },
264:         400
265:       );
266:     }
267:     const provider = getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(providerInput || undefined, env);
268:     const retry =
269:       payload.retry && typeof payload.retry === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.retry)
270:         ? (payload.retry as Record<string, unknown>)
271:         : {};
272:     const validation =
273:       payload.validation && typeof payload.validation === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.validation)
274:         ? (payload.validation as Record<string, unknown>)
275:         : {};
276:     const provenance =
277:       payload.provenance && typeof payload.provenance === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.provenance)
278:         ? (payload.provenance as Record<string, unknown>)
279:         : {};
280:     const autoFix =
281:       payload.autoFix && typeof payload.autoFix === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.autoFix)
282:         ? (payload.autoFix as Record<string, unknown>)
283:         : {};
284:     const toolchain =
285:       payload.toolchain && typeof payload.toolchain === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.toolchain)
286:         ? (payload.toolchain as Record<string, unknown>)
287:         : {};
288:     const cache =
289:       payload.cache && typeof payload.cache === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.cache)
290:         ? (payload.cache as Record<string, unknown>)
291:         : {};
292:     const deploy =
293:       payload.deploy && typeof payload.deploy === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.deploy)
294:         ? (payload.deploy as Record<string, unknown>)
295:         : {};
296:     const maxRetries = parseInteger(retry.maxRetries, 2, 0, 5);
297:     const outputDir = parseDeployOutputDir(deploy.outputDir);
298: 
299:     if (provider === 'cloudflare_workers_assets' && (!outputDir || !isSafeRelativeOutputDir(outputDir))) {
300:       return jsonResponse(
301:         {
302:           error: 'deploy.outputDir is required for cloudflare_workers_assets provider and must be a safe relative directory',
303:           code: 'provider_invalid_output_dir',
304:         },
305:         400
306:       );
307:     }
308: 
309:     const requestPayload = {
310:       provider,
311:       retry: {
312:         maxRetries,
313:       },
314:       validation: {
315:         runBuildIfPresent: parseBoolean(validation.runBuildIfPresent, true),
316:         runTestsIfPresent: parseBoolean(validation.runTestsIfPresent, true),
317:       },
318:       autoFix: {
319:         rehydrateBaseline: parseBoolean(autoFix.rehydrateBaseline, false),
320:         bootstrapToolchain: parseBoolean(autoFix.bootstrapToolchain, false),
321:       },
322:       toolchain: {
323:         manager: typeof toolchain.manager === 'string' && toolchain.manager.trim() ? toolchain.manager.trim() : null,
324:         version: typeof toolchain.version === 'string' && toolchain.version.trim() ? toolchain.version.trim() : null,
325:       },
326:       cache: {
327:         dependencyCache: parseBoolean(cache.dependencyCache, true),
328:       },
329:       deploy: {
330:         outputDir,
331:       },
332:       rollbackOnFailure: parseBoolean(payload.rollbackOnFailure, true),
333:       provenance: {
334:         trigger: typeof provenance.trigger === 'string' && provenance.trigger.trim() ? provenance.trigger.trim() : 'manual',
335:         taskId: typeof provenance.taskId === 'string' && provenance.taskId.trim() ? provenance.taskId.trim() : null,
336:         operationId:
337:           typeof provenance.operationId === 'string' && provenance.operationId.trim() ? provenance.operationId.trim() : null,
338:         note: typeof provenance.note === 'string' && provenance.note.trim() ? provenance.note.trim() : null,
339:       },
340:     };
341: 
342:     const requestPayloadSha256 = await sha256Hex(
343:       JSON.stringify(buildDeploymentIdempotencyPayload(requestPayload))
344:     );
345: 
346:     const created = await createWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, {
347:       id: generateWorkspaceDeploymentId(),
348:       workspaceId,
349:       provider,
350:       idempotencyKey,
351:       requestPayload,
352:       requestPayloadSha256,
353:       maxRetries,
354:       provenance: requestPayload.provenance,
355:     });
356: 
357:     if (!created.reused) {
358:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
359:         workspaceId,
360:         deploymentId: created.deployment.id,
361:         eventType: 'deployment_created',
362:         payload: {
363:           provider,
364:           maxRetries,
365:           provenance: requestPayload.provenance,
366:         },
367:       });
368:     }
369: 
370:     if (provider === 'cloudflare_workers_assets' && created.deployment.status === 'queued') {
371:       const hasPrecheckPassed = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
372:         env.DB,
373:         workspaceId,
374:         created.deployment.id,
375:         'deployment_provider_precheck_passed'
376:       );
377:       const hasPrecheckFailed = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
378:         env.DB,
379:         workspaceId,
380:         created.deployment.id,
381:         'deployment_provider_precheck_failed'
382:       );
383:       const alreadyEnqueued = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
384:         env.DB,
385:         workspaceId,
386:         created.deployment.id,
387:         'deployment_enqueued'
388:       );
389: 
390:       if (hasPrecheckFailed) {
391:         return jsonResponse(
392:           {
393:             error: created.deployment.error?.message ?? 'Provider precheck previously failed',
394:             code: created.deployment.error?.code ?? 'provider_deploy_failed',
395:           },
396:           400
397:         );
398:       }
399: 
400:       if (!hasPrecheckPassed && !alreadyEnqueued) {
401:         const claimTime = new Date().toISOString();
402:         const claimed = await env.DB
403:           .prepare(
404:             `UPDATE workspace_deployments
405:              SET error_code = 'provider_precheck_running',
406:                  error_message = 'Provider precheck in progress',
407:                  updated_at = ?
408:              WHERE id = ?
409:                AND workspace_id = ?
410:                AND status = 'queued'
411:                AND (error_code IS NULL OR error_code = 'retry_scheduled')`
412:           )
413:           .bind(claimTime, created.deployment.id, workspaceId)
414:           .run();
415: 
416:         if ((claimed.meta?.changes ?? 0) === 0) {
417:           const concurrent = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, created.deployment.id);
418:           if (concurrent) {
419:             return jsonResponse({ deployment: concurrent }, 200);
420:           }
421:         }
422: 
423:         try {
424:           const precheckChecks = await createWorkspaceDeployProvider(provider, env).precheck();
425:           const failed = precheckChecks.find((check) => !check.ok);
426:           if (failed) {
427:             const failureMessage = failed.details ?? 'Provider precheck failed';
428:             const now = new Date().toISOString();
429:             const failedUpdate = await env.DB
430:               .prepare(
431:                 `UPDATE workspace_deployments
432:                  SET status = 'failed',
433:                      error_code = ?,
434:                      error_message = ?,
435:                      finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?),
436:                      updated_at = ?
437:                  WHERE id = ?
438:                    AND workspace_id = ?
439:                    AND status = 'queued'
440:                    AND error_code = 'provider_precheck_running'`
441:               )
442:               .bind(failed.code, failureMessage, now, now, created.deployment.id, workspaceId)
443:               .run();
444: 
445:             if ((failedUpdate.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0) {
446:               await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
447:                 workspaceId,
448:                 deploymentId: created.deployment.id,
449:                 eventType: 'deployment_provider_precheck_failed',
450:                 payload: {
451:                   code: failed.code,
452:                   message: failureMessage,
453:                 },
454:               });
455:               await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
456:                 deploymentId: created.deployment.id,
457:                 status: 'failed',
458:                 errorCode: failed.code,
459:                 errorMessage: failureMessage,
460:               });
461:               return jsonResponse({ error: failureMessage, code: failed.code }, 400);
462:             }
463: 
464:             const concurrent = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, created.deployment.id);
465:             if (concurrent) {
466:               return jsonResponse({ deployment: concurrent }, 200);
467:             }
468:           }
469: 
470:           await env.DB
471:             .prepare(
472:               `UPDATE workspace_deployments
473:                SET error_code = NULL,
474:                    error_message = NULL,
475:                    updated_at = ?
476:                WHERE id = ?
477:                  AND workspace_id = ?
478:                  AND status = 'queued'
479:                  AND error_code = 'provider_precheck_running'`
480:             )
481:             .bind(new Date().toISOString(), created.deployment.id, workspaceId)
482:             .run();
483: 
484:           await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
485:             workspaceId,
486:             deploymentId: created.deployment.id,
487:             eventType: 'deployment_provider_precheck_passed',
488:             payload: {
489:               checks: precheckChecks,
490:             },
491:           });
492:         } catch (error) {
493:           const providerError = normalizeProviderError(error);
494:           const now = new Date().toISOString();
495:           const failedUpdate = await env.DB
496:             .prepare(
497:               `UPDATE workspace_deployments
498:                SET status = 'failed',
499:                    error_code = ?,
500:                    error_message = ?,
501:                    finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?),
502:                    updated_at = ?
503:                WHERE id = ?
504:                  AND workspace_id = ?
505:                  AND status = 'queued'
506:                  AND error_code = 'provider_precheck_running'`
507:             )
508:             .bind(providerError.code, providerError.message, now, now, created.deployment.id, workspaceId)
509:             .run();
510: 
511:           if ((failedUpdate.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0) {
512:             await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
513:               workspaceId,
514:               deploymentId: created.deployment.id,
515:               eventType: 'deployment_provider_precheck_failed',
516:               payload: {
517:                 code: providerError.code,
518:                 message: providerError.message,
519:               },
520:             });
521:             await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
522:               deploymentId: created.deployment.id,
523:               status: 'failed',
524:               errorCode: providerError.code,
525:               errorMessage: providerError.message,
526:             });
527:             return jsonResponse({ error: providerError.message, code: providerError.code }, 400);
528:           }
529: 
530:           const concurrent = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, created.deployment.id);
531:           if (concurrent) {
532:             return jsonResponse({ deployment: concurrent }, 200);
533:           }
534:         }
535:       }
536:     }
537: 
538:     const latestDeployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, created.deployment.id);
539:     const deploymentForQueue = latestDeployment ?? created.deployment;
540: 
541:     if (deploymentForQueue.status === 'queued') {
542:       const hasEnqueuedEvent = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
543:         env.DB,
544:         workspaceId,
545:         deploymentForQueue.id,
546:         'deployment_enqueued'
547:       );
548:       const shouldRecoverQueued = created.reused && deploymentForQueue.error?.code === 'retry_scheduled';
549:       const hasRecoveredReenqueue = shouldRecoverQueued
550:         ? await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentForQueue.id, 'deployment_reenqueue_recovered')
551:         : false;
552: 
553:       if (!hasEnqueuedEvent || (shouldRecoverQueued && !hasRecoveredReenqueue)) {
554:         if (env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOYS_QUEUE) {
555:           await env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOYS_QUEUE.send(
556:             createWorkspaceDeploymentQueueMessage(workspaceId, deploymentForQueue.id)
557:           );
558:         } else if (ctx) {
559:           ctx.waitUntil(
560:             runWorkspaceDeploymentInlineWithRetries(env, workspaceId, deploymentForQueue.id, deploymentForQueue.maxRetries + 1)
561:           );
562:         }
563: 
564:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
565:           workspaceId,
566:           deploymentId: deploymentForQueue.id,
567:           eventType: 'deployment_enqueued',
568:           payload: {
569:             mode: env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOYS_QUEUE ? 'queue' : 'inline',
570:             reused: created.reused,
571:           },
572:         });
573: 
574:         if (shouldRecoverQueued && !hasRecoveredReenqueue) {
575:           await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
576:             workspaceId,
577:             deploymentId: deploymentForQueue.id,
578:             eventType: 'deployment_reenqueue_recovered',
579:             payload: {
580:               reason: 'retry_scheduled_replay',
581:             },
582:           });
583:         }
584:       }
585:     }
586: 
587:     return jsonResponse({ deployment: deploymentForQueue }, created.reused ? 200 : 202);
588:   } catch (error) {
589:     if (error instanceof WorkspaceDeploymentIdempotencyConflictError) {
590:       return jsonResponse(
591:         {
592:           error: 'Idempotency key has already been used with different payload',
593:           code: 'idempotency_key_conflict',
594:         },
595:         409
596:       );
597:     }
598: 
599:     if (error instanceof SyntaxError) {
600:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Invalid JSON body' }, 400);
601:     }
602: 
603:     const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
604:     return jsonResponse({ error: `Failed to create workspace deployment: ${message}` }, 500);
605:   }
606: }
607: 
608: export async function handleWorkspaceDeploymentPreflight(
609:   workspaceId: string,
610:   request: Request,
611:   env: Env
612: ): Promise<Response> {
613:   const enabled = await ensureWorkspaceDeployEnabled(env);
614:   if (enabled) {
615:     return enabled;
616:   }
617: 
618:   const workspaceCheck = await ensureWorkspaceReady(env, workspaceId);
619:   if (workspaceCheck) {
620:     return workspaceCheck;
621:   }
622: 
623:   let payload: Record<string, unknown> = {};
624:   try {
625:     const raw = await request.text();
626:     if (raw.trim()) {
627:       const parsed = JSON.parse(raw) as unknown;
628:       if (!parsed || typeof parsed !== 'object' || Array.isArray(parsed)) {
629:         return jsonResponse({ error: 'Request body must be a JSON object' }, 400);
630:       }
631:       payload = parsed as Record<string, unknown>;
632:     }
633:   } catch {
634:     return jsonResponse({ error: 'Invalid JSON body' }, 400);
635:   }
636: 
637:   const validation =
638:     payload.validation && typeof payload.validation === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.validation)
639:       ? (payload.validation as Record<string, unknown>)
640:       : {};
641:   const autoFix =
642:     payload.autoFix && typeof payload.autoFix === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.autoFix)
643:       ? (payload.autoFix as Record<string, unknown>)
644:       : {};
645:   const deploy =
646:     payload.deploy && typeof payload.deploy === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.deploy)
647:       ? (payload.deploy as Record<string, unknown>)
648:       : {};
649:   const providerInput = typeof payload.provider === 'string' ? payload.provider.trim() : '';
650:   const providerConfigError = getWorkspaceDeployProviderConfigError(env);
651:   if (!providerInput && providerConfigError) {
652:     return jsonResponse(
653:       {
654:         preflight: {
655:           ok: false,
656:           toolchain: null,
657:           checks: [{ code: 'provider_config_invalid', ok: false, details: providerConfigError }],
658:           remediations: [],
659:         },
660:         nextAction: 'Set WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROVIDER to simulated or cloudflare_workers_assets and retry preflight.',
661:       },
662:       200
663:     );
664:   }
665:   if (providerInput && providerInput !== 'simulated' && providerInput !== 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
666:     return jsonResponse(
667:       {
668:         preflight: {
669:           ok: false,
670:           toolchain: null,
671:           checks: [{ code: 'unsupported_deploy_provider', ok: false, details: `Unsupported provider: ${providerInput}` }],
672:           remediations: [],
673:         },
674:         nextAction: 'Use provider=cloudflare_workers_assets or provider=simulated.',
675:       },
676:       200
677:     );
678:   }
679:   const provider = getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(providerInput || undefined, env);
680:   const outputDir = parseDeployOutputDir(deploy.outputDir);
681: 
682:   if (provider === 'cloudflare_workers_assets' && (!outputDir || !isSafeRelativeOutputDir(outputDir))) {
683:     return jsonResponse(
684:       {
685:         preflight: {
686:           ok: false,
687:           toolchain: null,
688:           checks: [
689:             {
690:               code: 'provider_invalid_output_dir',
691:               ok: false,
692:               details: 'deploy.outputDir is required and must be a safe relative directory',
693:             },
694:           ],
695:           remediations: [],
696:         },
697:         nextAction: 'Set deploy.outputDir to your static build output directory and retry preflight.',
698:       },
699:       200
700:     );
701:   }
702:   const runBuildIfPresent = parseBoolean(validation.runBuildIfPresent, true);
703:   const runTestsIfPresent = parseBoolean(validation.runTestsIfPresent, true);
704:   const rehydrateBaseline = parseBoolean(autoFix.rehydrateBaseline, false);
705:   const bootstrapToolchain = parseBoolean(autoFix.bootstrapToolchain, false);
706: 
707:   try {
708:     const preflight = await runWorkspaceDeploymentPreflight(env, workspaceId, {
709:       runBuildIfPresent,
710:       runTestsIfPresent,
711:       rehydrateBaseline,
712:       bootstrapToolchain,
713:       provider,
714:       outputDir,
715:     });
716: 
717:     if (provider === 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
718:       try {
719:         const providerChecks = await createWorkspaceDeployProvider(provider, env).precheck();
720:         preflight.checks.push(...providerChecks);
721:       } catch (error) {
722:         const providerError = normalizeProviderError(error);
723:         preflight.checks.push({ code: providerError.code, ok: false, details: providerError.message });
724:       }
725:       preflight.ok = preflight.checks.every((check) => check.ok);
726:     }
727: 
728:     const failedCheck = preflight.checks.find((check) => !check.ok);
729:     const nextAction = failedCheck
730:       ? failedCheck.code === 'validation_tooling'
731:         ? 'Disable build/test validation or install the detected package manager in the sandbox runtime image.'
732:         : failedCheck.code === 'git_baseline'
733:           ? 'Reset workspace to rebuild git baseline and retry deploy.'
734:           : failedCheck.code === 'secret_scan'
735:             ? 'Remove sensitive files from workspace before deploying.'
736:             : failedCheck.code === 'toolchain_detect'
737:               ? 'Fix package.json/lockfile metadata and retry preflight.'
738:               : failedCheck.code === 'toolchain_bootstrap'
739:                 ? 'Enable auto-fix bootstrap or use a sandbox image with corepack support.'
740:                 : failedCheck.code === 'project_root'
741:                   ? 'Set workspace source project root to a safe relative path and retry preflight.'
742:                   : failedCheck.code === 'provider_invalid_output_dir'
743:                     ? 'Set deploy.outputDir to a valid static build output directory and retry preflight.'
744:                     : failedCheck.code === 'provider_auth_failed'
745:                       ? 'Verify Cloudflare account credentials in worker env and retry preflight.'
746:                       : failedCheck.code === 'provider_scope_missing'
747:                         ? 'Grant required Cloudflare token scopes and retry preflight.'
748:                         : failedCheck.code === 'provider_project_not_found'
749:                           ? 'Set WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROJECT_NAME to a valid Workers project and retry preflight.'
750:                           : failedCheck.code === 'provider_rate_limited'
751:                             ? 'Wait for provider rate limits to reset and retry preflight.'
752:             : null
753:       : null;
754:     return jsonResponse({ preflight, nextAction });
755:   } catch (error) {
756:     const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
757:     return jsonResponse(
758:       {
759:         preflight: {
760:           ok: false,
761:           toolchain: null,
762:           checks: [{ code: 'internal_error', ok: false, details: message }],
763:           remediations: [],
764:         },
765:       },
766:       500
767:     );
768:   }
769: }
770: 
771: export async function handleGetWorkspaceDeployment(
772:   workspaceId: string,
773:   deploymentId: string,
774:   env: Env
775: ): Promise<Response> {
776:   const workspaceMissing = await ensureWorkspaceExists(env, workspaceId);
777:   if (workspaceMissing) {
778:     return workspaceMissing;
779:   }
780: 
781:   const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
782:   if (!deployment) {
783:     return jsonResponse({ error: 'Deployment not found' }, 404);
784:   }
785: 
786:   return jsonResponse({
787:     deployment,
788:     nextAction: nextActionForDeploymentError(deployment.error?.code),
789:   });
790: }
791: 
792: export async function handleGetWorkspaceDeploymentEvents(
793:   workspaceId: string,
794:   deploymentId: string,
795:   request: Request,
796:   env: Env
797: ): Promise<Response> {
798:   const workspaceMissing = await ensureWorkspaceExists(env, workspaceId);
799:   if (workspaceMissing) {
800:     return workspaceMissing;
801:   }
802: 
803:   const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
804:   if (!deployment) {
805:     return jsonResponse({ error: 'Deployment not found' }, 404);
806:   }
807: 
808:   const url = new URL(request.url);
809:   const from = Number.parseInt(url.searchParams.get('from') ?? '0', 10);
810:   const limit = Number.parseInt(url.searchParams.get('limit') ?? '500', 10);
811:   const fromExclusive = Number.isFinite(from) && from > 0 ? from : 0;
812:   const boundedLimit = Number.isFinite(limit) ? Math.max(1, Math.min(limit, 1000)) : 500;
813: 
814:   const events = await listWorkspaceDeploymentEvents(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId, fromExclusive, boundedLimit);
815:   return jsonResponse({ deploymentId, events });
816: }
817: 
818: export async function handleCancelWorkspaceDeployment(
819:   workspaceId: string,
820:   deploymentId: string,
821:   env: Env,
822:   ctx?: ExecutionContext
823: ): Promise<Response> {
824:   const workspaceMissing = await ensureWorkspaceExists(env, workspaceId);
825:   if (workspaceMissing) {
826:     return workspaceMissing;
827:   }
828: 
829:   const cancelResult = await cancelWorkspaceDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
830:   if (!cancelResult.deployment) {
831:     return jsonResponse({ error: 'Deployment not found' }, 404);
832:   }
833: 
834:   if (cancelResult.updated) {
835:     if (
836:       !env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOYS_QUEUE &&
837:       ctx &&
838:       cancelResult.deployment?.status === 'running' &&
839:       cancelResult.deployment.cancelRequestedAt
840:     ) {
841:       ctx.waitUntil(runWorkspaceDeploymentInlineWithRetries(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 2));
842:     }
843: 
844:     return jsonResponse({ deployment: cancelResult.deployment }, 202);
845:   }
846: 
847:   if (cancelResult.deployment.status === 'running' && cancelResult.deployment.cancelRequestedAt) {
848:     return jsonResponse({ deployment: cancelResult.deployment }, 202);
849:   }
850: 
851:   return jsonResponse(
852:     {
853:       error: 'Deployment is already terminal and cannot be cancelled',
854:       code: 'deployment_not_cancellable',
855:       deployment: cancelResult.deployment,
856:     },
857:     409
858:   );
859: }

(End of file - total 859 lines)
</content>

23: async function getTableColumns(env: Env, tableName: string): Promise<string[]> {

32:   const record = await env.DB.prepare('SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type = ? AND name = ? LIMIT 1')
33:     .bind('table', tableName)
34:     .first<{ name: string }>();

65:   checks.push({

state.title: packages/worker/src/api/system.ts

parts.text:
No blocking issues found in the latest fix across:

- `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deploy-provider.ts`
- `packages/worker/src/api/workspace-deployments.ts`
- `packages/worker/src/api/system.ts`

`WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROVIDER` invalid values are now explicitly surfaced (via `getWorkspaceDeployProviderConfigError`) in both create/preflight and system readiness flows, so requests no longer silently fall back to `simulated` when env config is invalid.
